blood-pressure-calculator.title: Калькулятор Blood Pressure
blood-pressure-calculator.description: Free Blood Pressure Calculator — Interpret systolic and diastolic blood pressure readings and understand your cardiovascular health. Get instant classification of your BP according to clinical guidelines with personalized recommendations.

mean-arterial-pressure.title: Калькулятор Mean Arterial Pressure
mean-arterial-pressure.description: Free Mean Arterial Pressure Calculator — Calculate MAP from systolic and diastolic blood pressure. Essential for assessing tissue perfusion and cardiovascular function in clinical settings.

pulse-pressure.title: Калькулятор Pulse Pressure
pulse-pressure.description: Free Pulse Pressure Calculator — Compute pulse pressure from systolic and diastolic readings. Monitor arterial stiffness and cardiovascular risk with this simple clinical measurement.

cardiac-output.title: Калькулятор Cardiac Output
cardiac-output.description: Free Cardiac Output Calculator — Estimate cardiac output from heart rate and stroke volume. Assess how well your heart pumps blood to support vital organ function.

stroke-volume.title: Калькулятор Stroke Volume
stroke-volume.description: Free Stroke Volume Calculator — Calculate stroke volume from cardiac output and heart rate. Measure the amount of blood pumped per heartbeat for cardiac assessment.

ejection-fraction.title: Калькулятор Ejection Fraction
ejection-fraction.description: Free Ejection Fraction Calculator — Estimate left ventricular ejection fraction from stroke volume and end-diastolic volume. Critical for diagnosing and monitoring heart failure.

heart-age.title: Калькулятор Heart Age
heart-age.description: Free Heart Age Calculator — Estimate your heart age based on blood pressure, BMI, smoking status, and other risk factors. Understand your cardiovascular risk compared to your chronological age.

framingham-risk-score.title: Калькулятор Framingham Risk Score
framingham-risk-score.description: Free Framingham Risk Score Calculator — Estimate 10-year cardiovascular disease risk using the Framingham Heart Study model. Assess coronary heart disease risk for preventive care planning.

ascvd-risk.title: Калькулятор ASCVD Risk
ascvd-risk.description: Free ASCVD Risk Calculator — Estimate 10-year and lifetime atherosclerotic cardiovascular disease risk using the ACC/AHA pooled cohort equations. Guide statin therapy and prevention decisions.

chads-vasc-score.title: Калькулятор CHADS-VASc Score
chads-vasc-score.description: Free CHADS-VASc Score Calculator — Assess stroke risk in patients with atrial fibrillation using the CHADS-VASc scoring system. Guide anticoagulation therapy decisions for stroke prevention.

heart-rate-zone.title: Калькулятор Heart Rate Zone
heart-rate-zone.description: Free Heart Rate Zone Calculator — Determine your target heart rate zones for exercise based on age and resting heart rate. Optimize workout intensity for fat burn, cardio, and peak performance.

target-heart-rate.title: Калькулятор Target Heart Rate
target-heart-rate.description: Free Target Heart Rate Calculator — Calculate your ideal target heart rate for exercise using the Karvonen method. Train at the right intensity for maximum cardiovascular benefits.

waist-to-hip-ratio.title: Калькулятор Waist-to-Hip Ratio
waist-to-hip-ratio.description: Free Waist-to-Hip Ratio Calculator — Measure your waist-to-hip ratio to assess body fat distribution and cardiovascular risk. Simple anthropometric measurement for metabolic health screening.

waist-to-height-ratio.title: Калькулятор Waist-to-Height Ratio
waist-to-height-ratio.description: Free Waist-to-Height Ratio Calculator — Evaluate your waist-to-height ratio as a predictor of cardiometabolic risk. A simple and effective screening tool for central obesity and health risks.

body-roundness-index.title: Калькулятор Body Roundness Index
body-roundness-index.description: Free Body Roundness Index Calculator — Calculate your Body Roundness Index (BRI) from height and waist circumference. A newer anthropometric measure that estimates body fat distribution and health risk.

ponderal-index.title: Калькулятор Ponderal Index
ponderal-index.description: Free Ponderal Index Calculator — Calculate the Ponderal Index as an alternative to BMI for assessing body mass relative to height. Useful for pediatric and adult body composition assessment.

frame-size.title: Калькулятор Frame Size
frame-size.description: Free Frame Size Calculator — Determine your body frame size based on wrist circumference and height. Understand your skeletal frame type to set realistic weight and body composition goals.

lean-body-mass.title: Калькулятор Lean Body Mass
lean-body-mass.description: Free Lean Body Mass Calculator — Estimate your lean body mass (LBM) using validated formulas. Track muscle mass versus fat mass for fitness progress and body composition analysis.

fat-free-mass-index.title: Калькулятор Fat-Free Mass Index
fat-free-mass-index.description: Free Fat-Free Mass Index Calculator — Calculate FFMI as a height-adjusted measure of lean muscle mass. Used by athletes and clinicians to assess nutritional status and muscle development.

skeletal-muscle-mass.title: Калькулятор Skeletal Muscle Mass
skeletal-muscle-mass.description: Free Skeletal Muscle Mass Calculator — Estimate your skeletal muscle mass using anthropometric measurements. Monitor muscle development and sarcopenia risk for better health outcomes.
